name: Hot & Spicy Chicken Quesadillas
recipeIngredient: 2 Boneless chicken breasts, cut into strips
4 teaspoons Canola oil or plain vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the Calphalon Solo Griddle on medium heat on top of the stove.
2. Add the olive oil to the hot pan.
3. Place the chicken strips, chili sauce, and jalapeno pepper in the pan and sauté until cooked through, approximately 3-5 minutes. Remove and reserve.
4. Wipe the pan clean.
5. Place the chicken mixture on one half of each of the 4 flour tortillas.
6. Sprinkle with cheese and fold over to form a half circle.
7. Preheat the Calphalon Solo Griddle again on medium. Oil the cooking surface with 1 teaspoon Canola oil.
8. Place a filled tortilla on the cooking surface. Cook until light brown, then turn and cook for another minute on the other side. Repeat with the remaining three tortillas.
9. Slice each tortilla into wedges and serve with salsa and black beans.
Serves 4
